rationale.http://keg.cs.tsinghua.edu.cn/jietang/pu: 'Self-supervised Learning: Generative or Contrastive' (Liu et al., TKDE 2021) — comprehensive survey of SSL methods for representation learning across CV, NLP, and graphs. Direct match to query scope.
rationale.https://lightning.ai/docs/pytorch/1.8.1/: PyTorch Lightning / UvA DL Tutorial 13: Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning with SimCLR — hands-on tutorial from a major ML framework, covers SimCLR implementation and theory. High practical value.
rationale.https://link.springer.com/article/10.100: 'Contrastive self-supervised learning: review, progress...' (Springer) — comprehensive review of CL methodology, encoding techniques, and loss functions. Survey paper directly on-topic.
rationale.https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/IC: 'Contrasting Contrastive Self-Supervised Representation Learning Pipelines' (ICCV 2021) — analyzes how different training methods and datasets influence performance across contrastive SSL methods.
rationale.https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/971: IEEE 'Contrasting Contrastive Self-Supervised Representation Learning' — analysis paper on contrastive approaches as the most successful SSL paradigm. Peer-reviewed.
rationale.https://asci-cbl-practicals2025.readthed: 'Practical 5: Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning with SimCLR' — recent (2025) practical tutorial covering SimCLR in detail. Relevant and accessible.
rationale.https://arxiv.org/pdf/2510.10572: 'Understanding Self-supervised Contrastive Learning through Supervised...' — theory paper introducing prototype representation bias and balanced contrastive loss. Explains contrastive learning behavior at a foundational level.
rationale.https://keras.io/examples/vision/simsiam: Keras SimSiam implementation example — official Keras tutorial on non-contrastive SSL. Covers self-supervised representation learning without negative pairs; useful counterpoint to standard contrastive methods.
rationale.https://arxiv.org/html/2509.11316v1: 'Contrastive Network Representation Learning' — covers contrastive learning for graph/network representations, extending the query to graph SSL.
rationale.https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/ar: 'Mixing up contrastive learning: Self-supervised representation learning...' — ScienceDirect paper on augmentation strategies in contrastive SSL. Covers the data augmentation perspective.

notes: Pool of 33 has good on-topic signal but also noise: Google 2020 year-in-review (broad, unfocused), LLM patterns blog (off-topic), 'Faster sorting algorithms with RL' (Nature, completely off-topic), DL history (tangential), HuBERT explanation (tangential speech model), prompt engineering blog. Many domain-specific application papers present: protein embeddings, remote sensing, histopathology, speech/audio SSL, molecular property prediction, EHR — all relevant to contrastive SSL but narrowly domain-specific. Top-10 prioritizes foundational surveys, ICCV/IEEE papers, and framework tutorials over domain applications.
